title: Targeted retention incentive for FE teachers
body: "This document provides information on the number of applications and approved claims for the targeted retention incentive for FE teachers in the 2024 to 2025 academic year.  ‘Targeted retention incentive for FE teachers: final data for academic year 2024 to 2025’ is an update to an interim publication released in May 2025 and represents final figures for academic year 2024 to 2025.  ‘Targeted retention incentive for FE teachers: data as of 5 May 2025’ is provisional data based on an extract of claims data as of 5 May 2025.  "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
